description: Aphanie (Aphanizomenon sp) is periodically detected in the surface water of the Baltic Sea.
Denitrix (Sulfurimonas gotlandica str. GD1) is an Epsilonproteobaterium isolated in May 2005 from Gotland Deep oxic-anoxic interface (215 m water depth).
Sulfato (Desulforhopalus MAG bin145) was detected in the redox transition zone (80 am water depth) at Gotland Deep in August 2019.
Methazir (Methanosarcina baltica GS1-AT) was isolated from sediment at a depth of 241 m in the Gotland Deep of the Baltic Sea in April 1993.
Voltothrix (Electrothrix aarhusiensis) was detected in 2017 from Baltic Sea sediments.

Methano (Methanococcales MC1109) was found using fluorescent in situ hybridization in Black Sea sediments in April-May 2003.
Ferrious (Shewanella putrefaciens MR9) was detected in the water depth 80–90 m (Mn reduction) in the summer 1988.
